On East Lawn Court, in the side yard of a private residence.
3051 E Washington Ave, Madison, WI 53704, USA
Several black walnut trees on the sides of the bike path. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
A few really nice blackberry bushes on the path running by the creek bed. Wild strawberries are everywhere on the wooded paths near the golf course, but they tend to be small and seedy.
3102 St Paul Ave, Madison, WI 53714, USA
Mendota at Sycamore, Madison, WI 53714, USA

Overhanging the Mayfair Park sign and bus stop bench is a rather large serviceberry tree. When it is in season it drops a lot of fruit, and all of it is easy to reach since there's nothing blocking you going around the tree. Access: Public.
A few really nice blackberry bushes on the path running by the creek bed. Wild strawberries are everywhere on the wooded paths near the golf course, but they tend to be small and seedy.
